=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:5-4:10) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D2] (8:5-8:10) TS377006: This Effect never succeeds; using `return yield*` preserves a definitive generator exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

[D3] (11:69-11:85) TS2769: No overload matches this call.
  The last overload gave the following error.
    Argument of type '(a: string) => Effect.Effect<never, string, never>' is not assignable to parameter of type '(this: unknown, a: string) => Generator<Effect<any, any, any>, unknown, never>'.
      Type 'Effect<never, string, never>' is missing the following properties from type 'Generator<Effect<any, any, any>, unknown, never>': next, return, throw, map, and 11 more.
  (no quick fixes)

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFnUntraced.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplainUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*(){
    return yield* Effect.fail("no"); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainUntracedEager = Effect.fnUntracedEager(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStarFnUntraced.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

export const shouldComplainUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced(function*(){
    yield* Effect.fail("no") // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldComplainUntracedEager = Effect.fnUntracedEager(function*(){
    return yield* Effect.fail("no"); // <- should emit an error be return yield*
})

export const shouldNotComplainRegularFnUntraced = Effect.fnUntraced((a: string) => {
    return Effect.fail(a)
})
